welcome.first_time: 👋 Welcome to SocialtoFeed! Get posts from YouTube, Twitter, Instagram & more — straight to Telegram.

account.send_link: Send the link or username for {platform}: Example: {example}
account.added: ✅ {name} added! First fetch will happen within {interval} minutes.
account.already_exists: ⚠️ This account is already in your list.
account.quota_reached: 📊 You've reached your limit of {limit} accounts. Upgrade to add more: /subscription
account.not_found: ❓ Account not found. It may have been deleted or renamed.
account.private: 🔒 This page is private. It needs to be public to be monitored.
account.list_empty:
You haven't added any accounts yet.

Tap ➕ Add Account to get started.

post.download_link: 📦 File too large for Telegram — here's the direct link:
post.download_timeout: ⏱ Download timed out — sending direct link instead.
post.footer: 🤖 SocialtoFeed — Get social feeds in Telegram 👉 t.me/{bot_username}

subscription.screenshot_prompt: Send a screenshot of your payment receipt:
subscription.submitted: ✅ Payment request submitted! We'll review it shortly. You'll be notified once approved. Your request ID: {ref}
subscription.approved: 🎉 Your {plan} subscription is now active! Expires: {expires}
subscription.expiry_warning: ⏰ Your subscription expires in {days} day(s). Renew now to keep uninterrupted service: /subscription
subscription.expired:
⚠️ Your subscription has expired. You've been moved to the Free plan.

Some accounts have been paused. Renew to reactivate: /subscription
subscription.pause_done: ⏸ Subscription paused for up to {days} days.
subscription.pause_already_used: ⚠️ You've already used your pause this billing period.
subscription.grace_started:
⏳ Your subscription has expired.
You have a 48-hour grace period to renew without losing your data.
subscription.compare_header: 📊 Plan Comparison Free — 5 accounts, 1 ticket Pro ⭐️ — 40 accounts, 2 tickets, no ads Premium 💎 — 100 accounts, 3 tickets, AI features, digest, channel forward

payment.mastercard_coming: 💳 Card payments coming soon! Currently we accept USDT (TRC20).
payment.expired_address: ⏰ Address expired. Start new from menu.

categories.name_prompt: Enter a name for the new category:
categories.deleted: 🗑 Category deleted. Accounts moved to General.
categories.delete_confirm: Delete {name}? Accounts inside will move to General.
categories.cant_delete_default: ⚠️ The General category cannot be deleted.

support.free_users:
🆘 Support is available for Pro and Premium subscribers.

Upgrade to get help: /subscription
support.header: 🆘 Support Ask a question or open a ticket.
support.ticket_submitted: ✅ Ticket submitted! Ticket number: {number} We'll reply shortly.
support.ticket_limit: ⚠️ You already have an open ticket. Pro users can have {limit} open tickets.

errors.generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
errors.banned: 🚫 Your access has been restricted. Contact support for more info.
errors.platform_down: 🔧 {platform} service is temporarily unavailable — this is on their end, not ours.
errors.rate_limit: ⏳ Temporary API limit hit. Bot will retry in 1 hour.
errors.ai_unavailable: 🤖 AI service is temporarily unavailable — post sent without processing.
errors.channel_permission: ❌ Bot lost access to the channel. Make sure the bot is still an admin.
errors.download_timeout: ⏱ Download timed out — sending direct link instead.

help.text: 🤖 How to use AiSocialFeed 1️⃣ Add an account Tap 📋 Accounts → ➕ Add Account → pick a platform → paste your link. 2️⃣ Browse your feed Tap 📊 Stats to see latest posts, or wait for your scheduled digest. 3️⃣ Organise with categories Tap 🗂 Categories to group accounts into folders. 4️⃣ Upgrade your plan Tap 💳 Subscription → compare Pro ⭐️ and Premium 💎 plans. 5️⃣ Get help Open a support 🎫 Ticket — Premium users can also ask the 🤖 AI directly. 💡 Tip: share your referral link (📤 Refer & Earn) to earn free subscription time!

referral.credited: 🎉 You earned a referral point! {count} total.
referral.redeem_success: ✅ Redeemed! Your reward has been applied.
referral.no_points: You have no points yet. Share your link to earn them!
